description: Runtime profile relationship export policy copied from export_general_runtime_profile.py Phase 9 baseline.

relationshipTaxonomyPolicy.commands: not exported as final type; refined into semantic runtime labels when possible
relationshipTaxonomyPolicy.directPairGate: semantic relationship edges must mention both endpoints unless they come from stable bootstrap
relationshipTaxonomyPolicy.stableConflictPolicy: stable relationship baseline types cannot be overwritten by indirect short evidence
relationshipTaxonomyPolicy.commandPolicy: command or dispatch evidence is battlefield contact unless a stable authority baseline or explicit lordship terms exist

focusProjectionPolicy.missingDataPolicy: Downstream must never invent missing person, relationship, event, or mood facts. When a target is only weakly linked, emit upstreamFeedback and keep sceneEligible=false.
focusProjectionPolicy.defaultUpstreamFeedbackReason: source needs upstream event or relationship evidence before scene use

declaredGeneralIds.upstreamFeedbackReason: participant exists, but relationship or scene authority is not established

aliasMatch.upstreamFeedbackReason: alias mention alone cannot create runtime scene data

recommendedActions: populate stable identity/profile seeds from source-grounded upstream evidence
missingStableInput.reason: runtime export cannot project a general until stable identity and profile seeds exist

recommendedActionByTraceSource.declaredGeneralIds: promote participant mention into source-grounded relationship edge or relationship evidence ref
recommendedActionByTraceSource.aliasMatch: replace alias-only runtime link with source-grounded event participant and relationship evidence

projectionSourceGap.fallbackRecommendedAction: add upstream source evidence before allowing runtime scene projection
projectionSourceGap.reason: projection is blocked until upstream supplies source-grounded scene or relationship authority
